tools.name: ask
tools.description: Ask a Korean legal question. Routes to 1 of 60 specialist AI legal leaders and returns a statute-verified analysis (real-time law.go.kr check). Supports Korean and English.

tools.name: ask_expert
tools.description: Expert mode legal analysis — runs the full verification pipeline for a more detailed, deeply-cited answer. Slower than `ask`.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Korean statutes, precedents and legal terms via law.go.kr. Returns matching law topics.

tools.name: get_leaders
tools.description: List all 60+ specialist legal leaders with their names and specialties.

tools.name: chat_leader
tools.description: Chat 1:1 with a specific legal leader. Provide the leader_id (e.g. 'L01', 'L32', 'CCO') from get_leaders.

tools.name: suggest_questions
tools.description: Generate relevant follow-up legal questions for a given query.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
